overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking along a forest trail during a stormy night. The character travels from a coastal path with ocean views into a dense pine forest, eventually approaching a stone shrine structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal forest trail with ocean views

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along the dirt path with sword at hip

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest
large gray rock formation lining the left side of the path
dark ocean visible through the trees on the right side
tall evergreen trees surrounding the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night with the samurai walking along a coastal forest trail. Rocky cliffs rise on the left while the dark ocean is visible through the trees on the right. The path winds through dense pine forest under a stormy sky.

events.description: path curves deeper into forest, ocean view disappears behind trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail deeper into the forest

segments.scene_description: The trail curves left into denser forest, losing the ocean view as the canopy closes in. The rocky cliff face recedes into the distance on the left while tall pines surround the path on both sides.

agents.ego_description: walking through the deep forest with rocky outcrops visible on the left

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the deep forest with large rock formations pressing close on the left side. The trees grow taller and denser, creating a dark, enclosed atmosphere as the character progresses along the trail.

events.description: stone shrine gate becomes visible in the distance ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: approaching a stone shrine structure visible ahead through the trees

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone torii gate visible ahead on the forest path

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the forest, a stone shrine gate becomes visible in the distance ahead. The rocky terrain gives way to denser woodland as the path leads toward the traditional Japanese structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy coastal trail that gradually transitions into the claustrophobic depths of a dense pine forest. It begins with the samurai walking beside towering rocky cliffs on the left, while the dark ocean remains visible through the trees on the right. As the path winds forward, the camera follows the trail as it curves left, causing the ocean view to fade from sight. The scene then shifts as the canopy closes in overhead, with the rocky cliff face receding into the distance. Finally, the environment transforms into a secluded woodland where tall pines completely surround the path on both sides.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that gradually opens toward a distant spiritual landmark. It begins deep within the woods, where the path is pressed tight by towering rock formations on the left and an increasingly dense canopy of trees. As the character progresses, the atmosphere grows darker and more enclosed, with the forest thickening around the trail. The scene then shifts as the rocky terrain recedes, revealing a traditional stone shrine gate emerging through the woodland in the distance. The camera continues its forward momentum, following the path as it leads directly toward the Japanese structure.
